testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') to be hidden 21 × locator resolved to visible

Welcome to My CV Buddy!

99 | 100 | // Wait for modal to close - check for the modal container to disappear > 101 | await page.waitForSelector('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!', { state: 'hidden', timeout: 10000 }) | ^ 102 | console.log('✅ Onboarding completed') 103 | 104 | // ========================================== at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:101:16 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding steps... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md]]
